Ip Man 4: The Finale

葉問4

7.3
2019MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Following the death of his wife, Ip Man travels to San Francisco to ease tensions between the local kung fu masters and his star student, Bruce Lee, while searching for a better future for his son.
